perturbed_task_language: Put the wine bottle on the top of the drawer
perturbation_semantics: libero_goal P2 swap moves the wooden_cabinet fixture to the wine_rack_region location with yaw=π. Target predicate site (cabinet top_side) is therefore at world (-0.264, -0.276, ~1.12), NOT at the base layout's cabinet position.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot picks bottle but carries to base cabinet location, missing the swap-relocated cabinet top.
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17). Localized wine bottle by sampling dark vertical pixels at agentview (cols 124-130, rows 120-152): world xy median (-0.06, 0.00), top z=1.05. Confirmed with wrist cam after pre-pos: world (-0.067, -0.002), top z=1.057. Located cabinet top by scanning elevated pixels (rows 70-100, cols 40-70): flat top surface at world (-0.24, -0.27, z=1.13) — matches memory's t2 swap top_side site (-0.264, -0.276, ~1.12). Pi0_pick 'pick up the wine bottle' descended 7.8cm but did not auto-close (peak_lift=0.001); recovered by issuing a downward move_to which stalled at z=1.024 against the bottle (OSC contact), then manually set_gripper +1 (closed to qpos=0.008 — held). Verified grasp: bottle absent from original spot z=0.90 in agentview, new elevated cluster appeared centered at eef xy. Lifted to z=1.25, transitioned to z=1.30 (OSC max), moved to (-0.20, -0.25, 1.30) over cabinet top. Bottle base hung at z=1.135 (wrist confirmed) — only 0.5cm above cabinet top z=1.13. Released; libero_terminated fired immediately. Used reach-with-OSC-contact + manual close as a Pi0 close-loop recovery — bottle still graspable because OSC stalled with jaws around the neck.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.recovery_note: After pi0_pick exhausted budget without closing, scripted set_gripper +1 closed the jaws on the bottle (qpos=0.008 — thin object); lift confirmed via re-back-projection (origin pixel z dropped to table 0.90, new elevated mass at eef xy).
